'''katobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikocryst|oikocryst]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikocryst|oikocryst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| katobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kætebeth|kætebeth]] || [[word:kætebej|kætebej]] || [[word:kætebesh|kætebesh]] || [[word:kætebe|kætebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:katotoboth|katotoboth]] || [[word:katotoboj|katotoboj]] || [[word:katotobosh|katotobosh]] || [[word:katotobo|katotobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:katoboth|katoboth]] || [[word:katoboj|katoboj]] || [[word:katobosh|katobosh]] || [[word:katobo|katobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:katofboth|katofboth]] || [[word:katofboj|katofboj]] || [[word:katofbosh|katofbosh]] || [[word:katofbof|katofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:katobotho|katobotho]] || [[word:katobojo|katobojo]] || [[word:katobosho|katobosho]] || [[word:katoboko|katoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katoboth|katoboth]] || [[word:katoboj|katoboj]] || [[word:katobosh|katobosh]] || [[word:katobo|katobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katobothol|katobothol]] || [[word:katobojol|katobojol]] || [[word:katoboshol|katoboshol]] || [[word:katobokol|katobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katobothotho|katobothotho]] || [[word:katobojojo|katobojojo]] || [[word:katoboshosho|katoboshosho]] || [[word:katoboko|katoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katobothon|katobothon]] || [[word:katobojon|katobojon]] || [[word:katoboshon|katoboshon]] || [[word:katobokon|katobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katobothoro|katobothoro]] || [[word:katobojoro|katobojoro]] || [[word:katoboshoro|katoboshoro]] || [[word:katobokoro|katobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
